M

MagicPlaceholders - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders
Registry and helpers for MagicUtils placeholder resolution.

Metadata describing a placeholder namespace.

Debug listener for placeholder resolution events.

MagicPlaceholders.PlaceholderListener - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders
Listener for placeholder registry events.
MagicPlaceholders.PlaceholderResolver - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders
Resolves a placeholder value.
MagicPlaceholders.PlaceholderResult - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders
Result of placeholder resolution.

R

register(String, String, MagicPlaceholders.PlaceholderResolver) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders.MagicPlaceholders
Registers a placeholder resolver.

Registers a global placeholder resolver (no namespace).
registerLocal(Object, String, MagicPlaceholders.PlaceholderResolver) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders.MagicPlaceholders
Registers a local placeholder resolver scoped to an owner.

Registers or updates metadata for a namespace.

Removes a placeholder listener.

Resolves placeholders inside a string using the provided context.

Resolves placeholders inside a string for an audience.

Resolves placeholders inside a string with inline replacements.

Resolves the placeholder value for an audience and argument.
resolve(String, String, Audience, String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders.MagicPlaceholders
Resolves a placeholder value.
resolveResult(String, String, Audience, String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.placeholders.MagicPlaceholders
Resolves a placeholder value with error details.
